overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist Basim walking through a historic Middle Eastern city. The clip transitions from a covered colonnade into an ornate interior room, then exits to a sunlit street bustling with NPCs, ending at a central fountain plaza during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade with twisted marble columns

events.description: approaching and entering the carved wooden doorway into the building interior

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway toward the building entrance, passing decorative vases and columns

entered.detail: ornate spiraling stone columns lining the covered walkway
heavy green fabric drapes hanging between columns
large painted urns with blue patterns placed along the wall
intricately carved dark wooden entrance to the interior

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered colonnade with distinctive twisted marble columns and green hanging curtains. The area is sheltered and empty of people, with decorative ceramic vases lining the right wall. The camera approaches a carved wooden doorway at the end of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate reception hall with Persian carpets and lattice windows

events.description: fully entering the interior room from the covered colonnade
character turns slightly to navigate around the central column and furniture

agents.ego_description: walking through the furnished interior room, observing the ornate carpets and wooden furniture while heading toward the exit

entered.detail: large decorative rugs with intricate red and blue patterns covering the floor
tables, chairs, and shelves arranged throughout the room
wooden screens with geometric patterns allowing filtered light
ornate metal lanterns suspended from the ceiling
thick stone pillar supporting the ceiling in the room center

segments.scene_description: Inside an ornate reception hall, the character walks across Persian carpets past wooden furniture and decorative screens. The room features lattice windows, hanging brass lamps, and a large central column. The lighting is warm and mixed, with natural light filtering through the lattice work.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit historic street lined with cypress trees and stone buildings

events.description: exiting the building into the open outdoor street
emerging from dim interior into bright golden hour sunlight with long shadows
character adjusts path to navigate through denser crowd of NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded street among townspeople dressed in period robes and clothing, moving toward the plaza

notable_agents.action: group of robed townspeople conversing near a flower bed
individuals standing near building entrances and walking along the path

entered.detail: historic beige stone structures with arched windows and decorative facades
tall narrow evergreen trees lining both sides of the street
raised planters with pink and purple flowers
large stone arch connecting buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character exits into a sunlit historic street bustling with NPCs during golden hour. Tall cypress trees line the dirt path between stone buildings, while townspeople in period clothing walk and converse. The lighting shifts dramatically to warm, direct sunlight as the character navigates through the moderate crowd toward a distant archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with large rectangular fountain

events.description: entering the open plaza with the central fountain becoming visible
character turns right to walk along the edge of the fountain basin

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking around the central fountain, observing the water feature and townspeople gathered nearby

notable_agents.action: children and adults gathered at the fountain edge, some sitting by the water

entered.detail: stone basin with central water feature and multiple tiers
large palm plants in decorative containers around the plaza
active fountain with water spray and rippling surface

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide open plaza dominated by a large rectangular fountain with active water features. Potted palm trees surround the area, and townspeople gather at the fountain's edge. The character turns to walk along the fountain perimeter, with the stone buildings now visible in the background rather than immediately alongside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, shaded walkway through an ornate interior and out into a vibrant, sun-drenched city plaza. It begins along a covered colonnade featuring twisted marble columns and green curtains, moving past decorative ceramic vases toward a carved wooden doorway. As the camera passes through the door, the scene shifts into a warm reception hall filled with Persian carpets, brass lamps, and light filtering through lattice windows. The camera then exits the building, where the lighting transforms into the direct, golden glow of a bustling historic street lined with cypress trees and townspeople. Finally, the path opens into a wide plaza dominated by a large rectangular fountain and potted palms, with the camera turning to follow the water's perimeter against a backdrop of distant stone buildings.
